title: Middle-earth
description: Join the legendary world of Tolkien's universe from The Lord of The Rings to the Hobbit and more!
body:
-----

Welcome to this source-available project of Middle-earth mod.

This mod is about the famous universe of Middle-earth, from J. R. R. Tolkien's work, into Minecraft.

You'll find a brand new dimension with custom blocks, items, entity, generation, etc.



----- ## Current state of the mod As of now, the mod is in the Alpha development stage, meaning this project is still a prototype, and missing many core features we are planning on adding. ## Planned Features > - Brews and stews
Features related to cooking and fancy beverage preparation. > - Trading mechanics
A new trading feature. > - Next iteration on smithing & attributes system
Mechanics related to smithing and gear upgrades. > - Structures mechanics & Settlements
Immersive structures and settlements, aiming to have a cohesive environment. > - Hiring units
Creating a mechanic so npcs can join in the player's adventures! > - New factions
Each update we will deliver more and more factions with custom content for each such as armors, weapons, structures and mounts (or mount armor)! We have a list of factions we want to offer in the team design plans. ----- ## Credits
Click to Fold / Unfold ### Developers > - Jukoz > - ObliviousCrab > - Slooshyboi > - TomSchlom ### Artists (Models/Textures) > - Boenndal > - Sindavar > - Jooble > - ObliviousCrab > - Angmarzku > - Mark > - Jukoz > - R3tt0 ### Builders > - Angmarzku > - Arwaeneth > - Boenndal > - Jooble > - Jukoz > - ObliviousCrab > - Slooshyboi ### Contributors > - Froosty11 > - JB3 > - Khuz > - nullBlade > - Number_Sir > - Thorin_The_III ### Special Thanks dylanhugh and Angmarzku for their ideas & arts for Gundabad and more.
----- ## License All of our content is under the **ARR** license (**All Right Reserved**), meaning you cannot use our code without our written consent. If you want to use our code in any way, please write an issue using the [request template in our Github](https://github.com/Jukoz/middle-earth/issues/new?assignees=&labels=request&projects=&template=code_use_permission_request.yml). > **Please be aware that this project is a Minecraft Parody set in the Middle-earth universe and all rights are reserved under Tolkien domain.** ----- ## Contribution ### Contributing to the source code If you want to help us, please join our [Discord server][discord]. ### Translate our mod to different languages Current translation progress is as shown below:
